name: Tuna & Potato Bake.
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sunflower oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic, stirring until softened.
3. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and tomato puree; simmer for about ten minutes.
4. Mix in the tuna, black olives, mixed herbs, and sugar. Cook for an additional five minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 190°C (375°F) or gas mark 5.
6. Grease an oven-safe dish with some oil if needed.
7. Layer the potatoes, sauce mixture, and remaining ingredients in the prepared dish, finishing with a layer of sauce.
8. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the top.
9. Bake for 40 minutes until the potatoes are tender and golden brown.
